title: × Asplenicystopteris blindii
taxonomy: × Asplenicystopteris blindii is classified as a species of fern, specifically within the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Asplenicystopteris, which is a relatively rare and understudied group of ferns. × Asplenicystopteris blindii is often found in temperate and subtropical regions, where it grows in shaded, humid areas. The classification of this species is still being researched and refined by botanists. Further studies are needed to fully understand the relationships between × Asplenicystopteris blindii and other fern species.
